description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after a blue anthropomorphic cat character with a large, rounded head and expressive facial features. The toy has oversized oval eyes with black pupils, thick black eyebrows, a small orange nose, and a wide open mouth showing two prominent teeth. Its body is small compared to the head, with blue arms and legs, and it wears a tan shirt and dark pants. The toy holds a yellow star-shaped wand in its right hand, adding a playful and magical touch. The surface appears soft and slightly matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the limbs and tail are proportionally short and rounded.
description: A blue plush cat character with a large head, expressive face, and a yellow star wand, dressed in a tan shirt and dark pants. The toy is soft, rounded, and visually playful.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's large face, wide eyes, open mouth, and the yellow star wand held in its right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded head, small ear, and the side profile of the body and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, tail, and the wand extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, ear, and the wand held in the right hand.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and excited, with wide open eyes, raised eyebrows, and a big open mouth showing two teeth.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with legs apart, right arm extended forward holding a wand, and left arm bent slightly at the side.
